title: AADL Model Metadata Schema
description: Schema describing metadata associated with each AADL architectural model in the dataset.

model_id.description: Unique identifier assigned to the model

repository_url.description: URL of the original GitHub repository

file_path.description: Path of the AADL file within the repository

num_components.description: Number of architectural components in the model

generic_domain_labels.description: List of assigned application domain labels
